title: Looking for a translation of nge spinoff manga Its A Miraculous Win
display_title: Looking for a translation of nge spinoff manga Its A Miraculous Win
wikitext:
[]: Looking for a translation of nge spinoff manga "It's A Miraculous Win"             Quote Post by pepegapog » Sun Oct 02, 2022 10:02 pm Relatively obscure, compared to the other spinoffs so it's hard to find an english version (Japanese versions are v easy to find). Wouldn't mind paying to read it https://wiki.evageeks.org/It%27s_A_Miraculous_Win

[]: Re: Looking for a translation of nge spinoff manga "It's A Miraculous Win"             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Oct 02, 2022 10:09 pm I'm not sure an English version exists; to my knowledge was never localized. Might be worth digging around on scanlation sites for, or failing that if you really want to read it and are willing to spend some more substantial money commission someone to do a translation

[]: Re: Looking for a translation of nge spinoff manga "It's A Miraculous Win"             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Thu Jun 22, 2023 5:11 pm What would it take to commission some fan-translators?

[]: Re: Looking for a translation of nge spinoff manga "It's A Miraculous Win"             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Jun 25, 2023 2:37 pm Basically all of them charge by word count, so it depends on the length and density of the whole; Nuclear Lunchbox has talked about charging in the ballpark of 15 cent per word, so you can do the math from there. It's not gonna be cheap, but for a oneshot, it's likely not going to be too prohibitively expensive, either if you really want to have that tl

[]: Re: Looking for a translation of nge spinoff manga "It's A Miraculous Win"             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Jun 25, 2023 8:44 pm NightComesOn wrote: What would it take to commission some fan-translators?
